utterance: plan this multi-phase project with critic checkpoints

assertions.text: the agent should read skills/plan-lifecycle/SKILL.md before planning; the skill defines the ROADMAP.md + per-phase PLAN.md structure
the agent should produce both ROADMAP.md (high-level phase breakdown) and per-phase PLAN.md files with critic checkpoints per the skill's contract
each PLAN.md should include a 'deviation tracking' section per the skill (how to record when actuals diverge from planned)
the phases should have explicit boundaries (each phase has a deliverable + acceptance criteria), not a vague sequential sketch
the critic checkpoints between phases should be substantive review gates (e.g. 'verify acceptance criteria + run adversarial critic'), not generic 'review the work' placeholders

reference_solution: Agent reads plan-lifecycle/SKILL.md, creates ROADMAP.md with 4 phases + per-phase PLAN.md with critic checkpoints, defines deviation tracking, names specific deliverables per phase.
